title: begonia itatinensis
intro: Begonia itatinensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is also known as 'Dragon Blood Begonia' due to its red sap, which has been traditionally used for medicinal purposes. The plant's sap is said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, burns, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Begonia itatinensis is often used to make ointments, salves, and tinctures that can be applied topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
